title: Issuance of bonds or certificates of indebtedness
doc_html:
§672.  Issuance of bonds or certificates of indebtedness

Where sufficient funds cannot be provided out of either the general or road funds of the parish, the parish governing authority may either issue bonds or certificates of indebtedness under existing laws for the purpose of constructing the roads.
doc_text:
§672.  Issuance of bonds or certificates of indebtedness
Where sufficient funds cannot be provided out of either the general or road funds of the parish, the parish governing authority may either issue bonds or certificates of indebtedness under existing laws for the purpose of constructing the roads.
